author_identification.canonical_name_ar: أ. د. سعد بن عبد الله بن عبد العزيز الحميد
author_identification.scholarly_standing: Contemporary scholar and muhaqiq specializing in hadith studies

scholarly_context.tradition_position: A modern work addressing textual issues in a classical hadith collection
scholarly_context.historical_significance: Addresses a specific textual issue in the printed edition of al-Tabarani's al-Mu'jam al-Awsat
scholarly_context.muhaqiq_reputation: Reputed for meticulous work in hadith manuscript investigation
scholarly_context.tahqiq_methodology_note: Focuses on identifying and recovering omitted hadith texts from a unique manuscript
edition_known_issues: Missing folios in the base manuscript used for previous print editions
